notes: feat(v0.5.0): simplify platform onboarding — no API keys needed
- Telegram: remove api_id/api_hash from UI; credentials baked into binary
- Twitter/X: OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow in Rust (start_twitter_oauth command);
user just clicks one button, browser opens, no API keys required
- Email: auto-detect IMAP/SMTP server from domain (Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo,
GMX, web.de, t-online.de, iCloud, Posteo, Tutanota, etc.)
- Python sidecar: Twitter post_content supports OAuth 2.0 Bearer tokens
- Added sha2 crate for PKCE code_challenge computation
